trainers.quote: Hi! My name's Palmer. I heard a lot about you. You are from New Bark Town, right? You are much younger than I thought. So, I'd like you to show me. Show me the bond you've built with your Pokémon. Show me what you've learned through battles with Trainers!
trainers.quotePt: Hi! My name's Palmer. I remember you from when you were in Twinleaf. You were always playing with my son, right? You've grown up since then, and most impressively, too! So, I'd like you to show me. Show me the bond you've built with your Pokémon. Show me the skill you've acquired as a Trainer!

trainers.name: Palmer
trainers.roster: Heatran-4, Cresselia-4, Regigigas-4
trainers.species: Heatran, Cresselia, Regigigas
trainers.quote: So, you've come this far! As the Tower Tycoon, I'll have to give you my best effort. That's how the best Trainers show respect to each other. By battling all out as dedicated students of Pokémon!
